subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1921-01-13
subcodes.first_line: Say: Write thou this in the divine Books and Tablets: The mention of a new creation. Were We then wearied by the first creation? [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فرمودند بنویس این را در کتب و صحف الهی ذکر خلق جدید است افعیینا بالخلق الاول
